title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple (2026) - IMDb Rating and Details
text: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple (2026) is a horror, science fiction, and thriller film directed by Nia DaCosta and written by Alex Garland. The film has an IMDb rating of 7.5 out of 10 based on user votes. Runtime: 109 minutes. Release Date: January 15-16, 2026 (various territories). The film is the sequel to 28 Years Later (2025) and is the second installment in the new trilogy that continues the storyline from the original 28 Days Later franchise. Key cast members include Ralph Fiennes as Dr. Ian Kelson, Jack O'Connell as Sir Lord Jimmy Crystal, and Alfie Williams as Spike. Other cast members include Erin Kellyman and various others playing infected and uninfected characters in the post-apocalyptic Britain setting. The film's plot follows two parallel narratives: one involving Dr. Kelson's medical research and discoveries, and another following Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal's cult. The production combined creative talent from Danny Boyle (producer) and composer Hildur Guðnadóttir, who returns from the previous film.
